components.name: appbar
components.description: Top app bar with 4 variants (small, center-aligned, medium, large) and SafeAreaView support.

components.name: avatar
components.description: Circular avatar with image, icon, or text initials and 5 sizes (xSmall to xLarge).

components.name: button
components.description: MD3 button with 5 variants (filled, elevated, outlined, text, tonal) and icon support.

components.name: button-group
components.description: Standard and connected button groups with single or multi-select toggle behavior; replaces the deprecated MD3 segmented button.

components.name: card
components.description: Surface container with 3 variants (elevated, filled, outlined) and optional press handler.

components.name: checkbox
components.description: Binary selection control with checked/unchecked states and customizable colors.

components.name: chip
components.description: Input chip with 4 variants (assist, filter, input, suggestion) and icon/avatar support.

components.name: fab
components.description: Floating action button with 4 color variants (primary, secondary, tertiary, surface), 3 sizes (small, medium, large), and optional extended label.

components.name: icon-button
components.description: Icon-only button with 4 variants (filled, tonal, outlined, standard) and toggle support.

components.name: keyboard-avoiding-wrapper
components.description: Zero-config keyboard-aware wrapper with platform-specific behavior for form layouts.

components.name: layout
components.description: Layout primitives: Box, Row, Column, Grid (flexbox utilities), and Layout (SafeAreaView wrapper).

components.name: list
components.description: List container with interactive items, supporting headline/trailing text and dividers.

components.name: portal
components.description: Render children into a host elsewhere in the tree (Portal + PortalHost) for overlays like dialogs, sheets, and tooltips.

components.name: progress
components.description: Linear and circular progress indicators with determinate and indeterminate modes.

components.name: radio
components.description: Single-choice selection control with selected/unselected states.

components.name: slider
components.description: Single-thumb or range slider with continuous and discrete (stepped) modes and optional centered origin.

components.name: switch
components.description: Toggle control with optional icons and customizable thumb/track colors.

components.name: text-field
components.description: Text input with animated floating label, 2 variants (filled, outlined), and icon support.

components.name: typography
components.description: Text component using MD3 type scale with 15 variants (displayLarge to labelSmall).
